methods.name: Hand Micro-movement Authentication
methods.description: Passive authentication method intended to improve existing authentication methods by analyzing hand micro-movements using built-in 3D sensors in smartphones.

authenticator.name: Hand micro-movement patterns captured via 3D sensors

sources: @inproceedings{buriroPleaseHoldUnobtrusive2017,  title = {Please Hold on: {{Unobtrusive}} User Authentication Using Smartphone's Built-in Sensors},  booktitle = {2017 {{IEEE International Conference}} on {{Identity}}, {{Security}} and {{Behavior Analysis}} ({{ISBA}})},  author = {Buriro, Attaullah and Crispo, Bruno and Zhauniarovich, Yury},  year = {2017},  month = feb,  pages = {1--8},  doi = {10.1109/ISBA.2017.7947684}}
